text_excerpt: Campaigns | Louie French Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Louie French News My Plan Campaigns Contact Newsletter Business Club Petition: Save Bexleyheath Police Station Campaigns Have your say on Southeastern services As your Member of Parliament, I have fought on behalf of local rail passengers for improvements to local Southeastern services. Together, we have made progress... Sign the petition to stop HMOs Family homes in Old Bexley, Sidcup and Welling are under threat thanks to the rapid rise in Houses in Multiple Occupation (HMOs). Bexley homes are being divided... Save the International Baccalaureate The Government is axing funding for the International Baccalaureate (IB) without warning or consultation. The ill-considered decision means state schools and... Save Bexleyheath Police Station The Mayor of London, Sadiq Khan, is making £260 million of cuts to the Metropolitan Police Service, axing 1,700 police officers and staff, removing officers... Stop Labour's dart charge hike Labour's war on Bexley motorists continues. The Government plans to increase the Dart Charge to £3.50 per crossing for most drivers from 1 September 2025. The... Small Business Survey Old Bexley, Sidcup, and Welling are home to more than 3,600 small businesses and traders, employing thousands of people locally. However, they face significant... Bexley Village Superloop Campaign Louie French MP, Thomas Turrell AM and St. Mary's and St. James Ward councillors Kurtis Christoforides and Cameron Smith have launched a petition calling for... Securing great healthcare for all residents My promise to deliver more services for our local hospital has remained my priority since being elected. After two years of hard work and much lobbying... Fighting hard for better transport Whether it’s fighting Southeastern for more train services, TfL for more reliable buses, or against Labour’s anti-motorist policies, local people know that I am... Making Bexley safer for everyone Despite Sadiq Khan's many failures, Old Bexley and Sidcup remains one of the safest areas in Greater London. However, we have our challenges locally, especially... Protecting Bexley’s green and pleasant land Bexley is home to many fantastic parks and green spaces that we all enjoy. I will always support community volunteers and have worked hard with local residents... Supporting Bexley’s families and pensioners I will continue to support families with free childcare expansion and work with our schools to secure more resources and help Bexley improve special educational...
